languages.text: "Напоминаю, что уничтожение богохульных машинных модификаций — священный долг любого богобоязненного служителя Омниссии. Вы ведь в достаточной мере богобоязненны, генетор Фебрус?"
"I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"
languages.original_text: "Напоминаю, что уничтожение богохульных машинных модификаций — священный долг любого богобоязненного служителя Омниссии. Вы ведь в достаточной мере богобоязненны, генетор Фебрус?"

traits.locale_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every God-fearing servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently God-fearing, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

"I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every God-fearing servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently God-fearing, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

"I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every God-fearing servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently God-fearing, are you not, Genetor Februs?"
"I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

languages.text: «Debo recordarle que la destrucción de modificaciones mecánicas blasfemas es el sagrado deber de todo sirviente devoto del Omnissiah. Y usted entra en esa categoría, ¿no, genetor Februs?».
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

traits.locale_text: «Debo recordarle que la destrucción de modificaciones mecánicas blasfemas es el sagrado deber de todo sirviente devoto del Omnissiah. Y usted entra en esa categoría, ¿no, genetor Februs?».

languages.text: “我必须提醒你，摧毁亵渎的机械改装，是欧姆尼塞亚每一位虔诚信徒的神圣职责。你应当足够虔诚吧，基因士费布鲁斯？”
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

traits.locale_text: “我必须提醒你，摧毁亵渎的机械改装，是欧姆尼塞亚每一位虔诚信徒的神圣职责。你应当足够虔诚吧，基因士费布鲁斯？”

languages.text: « Je me dois de rappeler que la destruction des modifications blasphématoires de la machine est le devoir sacré de tout serviteur respectueux de l'Omnimessie. Êtes-vous suffisamment respectueux, genetor Februs ? »
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

traits.locale_text: « Je me dois de rappeler que la destruction des modifications blasphématoires de la machine est le devoir sacré de tout serviteur respectueux de l'Omnimessie. Êtes-vous suffisamment respectueux, genetor Februs ? »

languages.text: "Size günahkâr makine modifikasyonlarının yok edilmesinin, Hermesih'in dindar her hizmetkârının kutsal vazifesi olduğunu hatırlatmalıyım. Siz de yeterince dindarsınız, değil mi Genetör Februs?"
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

traits.locale_text: "Size günahkâr makine modifikasyonlarının yok edilmesinin, Hermesih'in dindar her hizmetkârının kutsal vazifesi olduğunu hatırlatmalıyım. Siz de yeterince dindarsınız, değil mi Genetör Februs?"

languages.text: 「冒涜的な機械改造の破壊は、オムニッシアに仕える敬虔な者すべての神聖な義務であることを、念のため申し上げておく。貴殿は十分に敬虔であろう、ゲネター・フェブラス？」
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"

traits.locale_text: 「冒涜的な機械改造の破壊は、オムニッシアに仕える敬虔な者すべての神聖な義務であることを、念のため申し上げておく。貴殿は十分に敬虔であろう、ゲネター・フェブラス？」

languages.text: "Ich muss Euch erinnern, dass die Zerstörung blasphemischer Modifikationen von Maschinen die heilige Pflicht jedes frommen Dieners des Omnissiah ist. Ihr seid doch fromm, oder, Genetor Februs?"
languages.original_text: "I must remind you that the destruction of blasphemous machine modifications is the sacred duty of every devout servant of the Omnissiah. You are sufficiently devout, are you not, Genetor Februs?"
